11258454.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
11258454.transcript: Stay on the enemy. No funny business.

29394575.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
29394575.transcript: A setback, but not above our pay grade.

58442410.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
58442410.transcript: There's gotta be a way to bring it down.

65310720.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
65310720.transcript: Put the heat on those cores!

75807966.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
75807966.transcript: And yet, it still hasn't reached its full potential.

89522105.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
89522105.transcript: We can't afford to waste time.

93723686.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
93723686.transcript: I've seen your tricks enough times.

102750084.label: PL2700_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL1600_3
102750084.transcript: Not down and out, are you?

105742483.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
105742483.transcript: Next time, aim for their vitals.

112067731.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
112067731.transcript: Even a dog knows when it's down.

113171160.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
113171160.transcript: My ears tell me your guns are well maintained.

121565240.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
121565240.transcript: I hope your dirt clumps don't block my lightning.

127552154.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1700_3
127552154.transcript: I'll keep the heat off you!

128805859.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
128805859.transcript: I don't like the look of this.

175869775.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
175869775.transcript: Well, you wield the power of a dragon god.

187311102.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
187311102.transcript: Seems you're in firm control of your power now.

195762052.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
195762052.transcript: I can neither confirm nor deny.

202691352.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
202691352.transcript: I won't let anyone get the jump on you.

210245190.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
210245190.transcript: Just another primal. Flametech should prove effective.

216280295.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
216280295.transcript: Despite your antics, I was still able to keep a bead on the target.

219136915.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
219136915.transcript: What brave pets. I just can't...

225034799.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
225034799.transcript: This man doesn't know the word prudence.

229519315.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
229519315.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

254917252.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
254917252.transcript: Alright. Mmm. Mmm. Hit the spot.

255344266.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
255344266.transcript: Can't say I've ever thought that.

261169532.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
261169532.transcript: You read their movements like a book.

264191505.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
264191505.transcript: I'd rather be working with Vaseraga right now.

270533581.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
270533581.transcript: Flamek is not to be trifled with.

274227975.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
274227975.transcript: Did he punch so fast it sparked flames?

275487143.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
275487143.transcript: Good. Get ready for the next.

276884702.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
276884702.transcript: Step back! Flamme is ready to howl!

302111175.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
302111175.transcript: You're intense when you aren't meditating.

312328569.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
312328569.transcript: So you know how to throw a punch too.

351834360.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
351834360.transcript: I guess there's a first for everything.

356211872.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
356211872.transcript: What do you think I've been doing?

356474580.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
356474580.transcript: Astral power is on another level.

361020124.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
361020124.transcript: We have to locate the catalyst.

362612984.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
362612984.transcript: I have to limit its output, actually.

374994886.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
374994886.transcript: Poetry can wait. This battle isn't over.

374997584.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
374997584.transcript: I won't let a single foe go unchecked.

377101938.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
377101938.transcript: Don't let up the heat just yet!

405697293.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
405697293.transcript: I trust you're taking this seriously.

421112340.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
421112340.transcript: Stay calm. They have the numbers, but we have the skill.

426926619.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
426926619.transcript: Come here. There's a good boy.

436020787.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
436020787.transcript: We're still a far cry away from true peace and quiet.

437346892.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
437346892.transcript: It's your consistency that amazes me.

452872911.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
452872911.transcript: Is there a limit to what alchemists can do?

452983609.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
452983609.transcript: Kind of you to ask, but no.

453594588.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
453594588.transcript: Stay sharp. Enemies could be around any corner.

455733214.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
455733214.transcript: If you ever need cover, call for me.

457975789.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
457975789.transcript: A quiet nod would've been plenty.

480159026.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
480159026.transcript: I didn't need all this noise.

485839774.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
485839774.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six. Top of my game.

486446127.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
486446127.transcript: It was easy to predict their movement.

487245007.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
487245007.transcript: Are your flames capable of bringing peace and quiet?

512002351.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
512002351.transcript: Are all of Avia's generals this unhinged?

518299758.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
518299758.transcript: Now then, what's the next mission?

529665908.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
529665908.transcript: If I even think you're up to no good...

537922733.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
537922733.transcript: For peace and quiet. It's what these skies deserve.

552581634.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
552581634.transcript: I'll bring peace and quiet back to the skies.

561822702.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
561822702.transcript: Can't rely on brute force alone.

563728629.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
563728629.transcript: We're go for the next phase!

571202904.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
571202904.transcript: Not bad. Not bad at all.

576030645.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
576030645.transcript: I owe you for holding down the front.

578537735.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
578537735.transcript: Good. You stuck to the plan.

596335292.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
596335292.transcript: Time for some peace and quiet.

596864502.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
596864502.transcript: Maybe I should revisit hand-to-hand training.

605056237.label: PL2700_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL2600
605056237.transcript: I'll get you up, but you're on your own after.

608432889.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
608432889.transcript: I take it you have a lot to fight for.

615144467.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
615144467.transcript: Then don't get so close next time.

619960483.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
619960483.transcript: The white dragons are a formidable faction.

621869657.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
621869657.transcript: God or not, I'll save these skies!

623916968.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
623916968.transcript: Come, we still have foes to contend with.

630511832.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
630511832.transcript: It's like your blade cuts the storm itself.

647198905.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
647198905.transcript: A shadow Eid? Doesn't bode well.

658549869.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
658549869.transcript: Steer clear, or you'll get caught in the crossfire.

676575301.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
676575301.transcript: No one in the sky realm wields twin blades like you.

682410543.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
682410543.transcript: Focus fire! And pierce through her guard!

711992150.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
711992150.transcript: This is the power of an angel.

722487627.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
722487627.transcript: Hey, don't get hit on purpose!

737090076.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
737090076.transcript: You were a blur! My eyes couldn't even track you!

742007898.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
742007898.transcript: It doesn't matter what he's become. He still bleeds.

761758476.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
761758476.transcript: Don't hold back! Lyria needs us!

764992405.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
764992405.transcript: Best not to jump the gun, Rackam.

767299240.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
767299240.transcript: Maybe I should step it up.

778433579.label: PL2700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
778433579.transcript: So the ends justify the means, huh?

785232405.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
785232405.transcript: I dream of a world filled with peace and quiet.

792041574.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
792041574.transcript: Not bad for an improvised attack.

802710644.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
802710644.transcript: Ten to one, that fire's deadly.

803510249.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
803510249.transcript: He sliced through our target while zigzagging between my lightning!

804940150.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
804940150.transcript: I thought the Supreme Primarch was all-knowing.

807205893.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
807205893.transcript: I've actually never thought about it.

818177038.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
818177038.transcript: Only a fool would underestimate your magic.

820134806.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
820134806.transcript: Only a pro could do that with such poise.

822246778.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_abs_2
822246778.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah

827951733.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
827951733.transcript: Swore I saw a dog here... Never mind.

839650751.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
839650751.transcript: Engage! Distract! Go for the kill!

846714218.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
846714218.transcript: Can you keep it down just a little?

858280867.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
858280867.transcript: Are any of your pets injured?

861646622.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
861646622.transcript: One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six.

884283447.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
884283447.transcript: You're an asset to any team.

894332727.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
894332727.transcript: Our enemies still have some fight left.

896642218.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
896642218.transcript: Oh, right. Sensitive eyes should look away.

899807481.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
899807481.transcript: I'll need to shield my eyes next time.

901106042.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
901106042.transcript: Sure. Point me to the next target.

901274250.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
901274250.transcript: I've seen your tricks before, Wolf.

933801442.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
933801442.transcript: Rackam and Eugen are more than loud enough.

937612164.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
937612164.transcript: And why are you on the front lines?

945822862.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
945822862.transcript: Didn't see this coming, but I won't back down!

948889753.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
948889753.transcript: Don't draw too much enemy fire.

949620237.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1600_3
949620237.transcript: Wait for backup before you jump in!

983755431.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
983755431.transcript: For a raid, they're light on personnel.

987208530.label: PL2700_vo_DMG_rise_4
987208530.transcript: Can't let him do me in!

995918999.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
995918999.transcript: Nope. I'm always three moves ahead.

998994829.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
998994829.transcript: When the mission calls for it.

1002584858.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
1002584858.transcript: So that's how you save your reserves.

1002657565.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
1002657565.transcript: Hard to compare to an eternal.

1013907448.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
1013907448.transcript: Get ready for the next foe!

1014593143.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
1014593143.transcript: Support fire is what I do.

1022222313.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
1022222313.transcript: Great work. You got the job done.

1022299957.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
1022299957.transcript: So, what are the six dragons plotting?

1024563047.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
1024563047.transcript: You certainly are a heated warrior.

1024821596.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
1024821596.transcript: I may never reach your level.

1037927546.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
1037927546.transcript: Guess you did earn your title as the Star-Sword Sovereign.

1042406067.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
1042406067.transcript: I know I can do better than that.

1042977461.label: PL2700_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
1042977461.transcript: Snack time. Mmm. It's sweet. Way too sweet. What the hell, Beatrix?

1058556944.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
1058556944.transcript: At this point, negotiation isn't an option.

1069765490.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
1069765490.transcript: With swords like those, who needs shields?

1071007973.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
1071007973.transcript: My next shots won't miss either.
